items.title: The downfall of Peter Mandelson
items.description: Peter Mandelson is used to penning resignation statements, but his latest might well be his last. He might even face time in prison.

items.title: Default pension funds: what’s in your workplace pension?
items.description: Default pension funds will often not be the best option for young savers or experienced investors

items.title: In defence of GDP, the much-maligned measure of growth
items.description: GDP doesn’t measure what we should care about, say critics. Is that true?

items.title: A niche way to diversify your exposure to the AI boom
items.description: The AI boom is still dominating markets, but specialist strategies can help diversify your risks

items.title: New PM Sanae Takaichi has a mandate and a plan to boost Japan's economy
items.description: Markets applauded new prime minister Sanae Takaichi’s victory – and Japan's economy and stockmarket have further to climb, says Merryn Somerset Webb
